item.title: Index of Key Entities and Concepts
item.description: The following index provides a structured overview of significant entities and concepts related to security management and vulnerability handling. Each entry includes the name and a brief description.

item.title: Project Maintainers
item.description: Overview Project maintainers are key individuals responsible for overseeing the R2R project. Their primary duties involve ensuring proper management and addressing security concerns within the project.

item.title: Vulnerability Report
item.description: The Vulnerability Handling Process is a systematic approach that organizations, like R2R, implement to identify, assess, and mitigate vulnerabilities effectively ...

item.title: Security Researchers
item.description: Overview Security researchers are pivotal in the realm of cybersecurity, focusing on identifying and addressing vulnerabilities in software and systems ...

item.title: Keep Confidential Label
item.description: Overview The Keep Confidential Label is a designation utilized in GitHub issues to indicate that the issue contains sensitive information that should not be disclosed to the public ...

item.title: New Version of R2R
item.description: The New Version of R2R has been developed to enhance security by addressing vulnerabilities identified in previous iterations. Here’s an overview of what this release entails: Key Features of the New Version Enhanced Security: This version is specifically designed to resolve issues highlighted in the Vulnerability Report.

item.title: Issue Template Overview
item.description: An issue template serves as a structured approach for developers to communicate specific concerns or requests within a collaborative platform, particularly in environments like ...

item.title: 2026-04-05-first-post
item.description: 完整最简拓扑图 Obsidian（写作） ⬇ Quartz（转静态网页） ⬇ GitHub（存代码 + 备份） ⬇ GitHub Pages（基础发布） ⬇ Cloudflare（加速 + 优化 + 自定义域名）.
